text: DEADLINE DAY: Hegseth vows Tuesday will see 'most intense day of strikes' on Iran since war began. Trump's 8pm ET (midnight GMT) Hormuz deadline expires TONIGHT. Power plants, bridges threatened if no deal.

sources.name: PBS — Hegseth most intense day of strikes

text: STRIKES INTENSIFY: US forces launching highest volume of strikes on Iran since Day 1. Hegseth: Monday was already highest-volume day; Tuesday will surpass it. 15,000+ enemy targets hit since war began.

sources.name: Times of Israel — Hegseth highest volume

text: CEASEFIRE REJECTED: Iran demands permanent end to war — rejects 45-day ceasefire from Egypt/Pakistan/Turkey mediators. 'We won't merely accept a ceasefire. We only accept an end of the war with guarantees.' No active diplomatic channel remains.

sources.name: Bloomberg — Iran rejects ceasefire before deadline

text: SAUDI DEFENSE: Riyadh air defenses intercepted 7 Iranian ballistic missiles + 10 attack drones — second deliberate strike on Saudi capital. Gulf states on high alert ahead of Hormuz deadline.

MOJTABA MYSTERY: Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei has not appeared publicly in 30 days since March 8. No photo, video, or audio. IRGC believed to be making wartime decisions. Pezeshkian unable to secure meeting. CIA searching for his location.

sources.name: Axios — CIA searches for Iran's new leader

text: LEBANON FRONT: 1,461 killed, 4,430 wounded since war began. Israel deepens southern offensive. Hezbollah southern front commander Haj Youssef Ismail Hashem killed by naval strike. Israeli forces push deeper into villages.

sources.name: Al Jazeera — 14 killed in Israeli strikes Lebanon
Al Jazeera — Israeli attacks deepen Lebanon fissures

text: OIL VOLATILE: Brent $110.05/WTI $113.42 ahead of deadline. Markets bracing for escalation. AAA gas $4.12/gal — above $4 since March 31. Analysts: $120-$150 if Bab al-Mandeb also closes. War cost: ~$38B+ direct military.

DEATH TOLL: Iran — HRANA: 3,540+ killed (1,616 civilians, 244 children); Health Ministry: 2,076+. Lebanon: 1,461 killed. Israel: 23 dead. US: 13 KIA, 365 WIA. Iraq: 109+ killed. France: 1 KIA. Total: 3,400+ across region.

DAY 39 AM: DEADLINE DAY — Trump's 8pm ET ultimatum expires TONIGHT. Hegseth: most intense strikes coming. Iran rejects ceasefire. Mojtaba Khamenei missing 30 days. Brent $110.05/WTI $113.42. Gas ~$4.12. 3,400+ dead. Saudi intercepted 7 missiles. Lebanon 1,461 killed. No diplomatic channel active.

IDF STRIKE WAVE: Completed 'wide-scale wave targeting dozens of infrastructure sites' across Iran — weapons storage, missile production, air defense systems. Explosions in Tehran/Karaj. Power outages reported, main transfer line damaged.

sources.name: Times of Israel — IDF completes wave of strikes

text: TEHRAN CARNAGE: 33+ killed in overnight residential strikes — Baharestan (13 dead incl 6 children under 10), Alborz (18 dead incl 2 infants), Shahriar (9 dead), Pardis (6 bodies recovered). Rafi-Nia Synagogue 'completely destroyed.'

sources.name: Al Jazeera — Synagogue destroyed, residential strikes
Middle East Eye — Strikes destroy synagogue

text: KHADEMI KILLED: IRGC intelligence chief Maj. Gen. Majid Khademi (IRGC No. 2) + Quds Force commander Asghar Bagheri killed in Israeli precision strike. Continues pattern of targeted assassinations of Iranian military leadership.

sources.name: Fox News — IDF confirms IRGC intel chief killed
Washington Times — Top IRGC official killed

text: KHARG ISLAND: New explosions reported on Iran's main oil export terminal hours before Trump deadline. Iranian state media confirms 'American-Zionist attacks.' Island handles ~90% of Iran's oil exports.

DAY 39 MIDDAY: Istanbul consulate attack — 3 gunmen fire on Israeli consulate, 1 killed, 2 captured. Iran calls human chains around power plants. King Fahd Causeway closed. Houthis attack 3 ships + 2 US frigates. Iranian missiles at S. Israel intercepted. DEADLINE 8PM ET.
